business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction and building operations; facilities include corporate office, equipment yard and warehouse, fabrication shop, branch office, and equipment storage. Additional named insured: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. dba Operations.

coverages_discussed.notes: 5 scheduled locations; total TIV $39,405,000 across building ($10,820,000), contents ($18,455,000), and BI ($10,130,000) values; 4 of 5 locations sprinklered; LOC-005 (Equipment Storage, Cranberry Township) has no sprinkler system; construction types include Fire Resistive, Non-Combustible, and Masonry Non-Combustible; 1 property claim in loss summary period totaling $36,750 incurred
35 claims; $1,126,509 paid; $1,171,607 total incurred; dominant loss line by both frequency and severity
8 claims; $47,076 paid; $99,900 total incurred; 15 scheduled drivers, all PA-licensed; experience ranges from 5 to 28 years
2024 total account premium; 13 claims reported in policy year 2024; premium not broken out by individual line of coverage in submission data

positives: 4 of 5 locations equipped with automatic sprinkler systems
Majority of locations feature Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Strong annual revenue of $95,000,000 with positive net income of $5,997,400
Equity position of $34,373,200 on total assets of $103,336,700
Driver roster demonstrates strong tenure; 9 of 15 drivers have 12 or more years of experience; top drivers carry 22-28 years experience
Low property claim frequency: 1 claim in loss summary period with modest severity ($36,750 incurred)
Relatively low auto loss severity: $99,900 total incurred across 8 claims
concerns: LOC-005 (Equipment Storage - Cranberry Township, 100 Dutilh Road, 28,000 sq ft) has no sprinkler system
Elevated WC claim frequency: 35 claims representing the largest loss line at $1,171,607 incurred
Rising account premium trend: $1,369,246 (2022) to $1,476,850 (2023) to $1,634,722 (2024), a 19.4% increase over two years
2021 recorded 15 annual claims, highest single-year count in 5-year history
Total account liabilities ($68,963,500) exceed equity ($34,373,200); debt-to-equity ratio exceeds 2:1
Four different carriers in five years (CNA 2020, Nationwide 2021, Zurich 2022, Berkshire Hathaway Guard 2023, Nationwide 2024) may indicate adverse market experience or pricing instability
GL total incurred ($176,947) is 67.8% higher than total paid ($105,421), indicating meaningful open/developing reserves
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 5-year insurance history (2020-2024) across 4 carriers. Annual claim counts: 6 (2020), 15 (2021), 4 (2022), 10 (2023), 13 (2024) totaling 48 reported claims. 2024 expiring premium is $1,634,721.63 with Nationwide Insurance. Loss summary across all lines totals 52 claims, $1,315,756 paid, and $1,485,204 total incurred. WC is the dominant loss driver (35 claims, $1,171,607 incurred, 78.9% of total incurred).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. operates 5 locations across Pennsylvania totaling approximately 151,500 square feet. LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters, 300 Liberty Avenue Suite 1200, Pittsburgh PA 15222 — 18,000 sq ft fire resistive office, built 2002, sprinklered, EPDM roof, TIV $3,600,000. LOC-002: Main Equipment Yard and Warehouse, 4500 Butler Street, Pittsburgh PA 15201 — 65,000 sq ft non-combustible warehouse, built 1995, sprinklered, EPDM roof, TIV $17,550,000. LOC-003: Fabrication Shop, 4520 Butler Street, Pittsburgh PA 15201 — 32,000 sq ft masonry non-combustible manufacturing, built 1988, sprinklered, TPO roof, TIV $8,000,000. LOC-004: South Hills Branch Office, 3000 Village Run Road, Wexford PA 15090 — 8,500 sq ft, 2-story masonry non-combustible office, built 2010, sprinklered, shingle roof, TIV $2,975,000. LOC-005: Equipment Storage - Cranberry, 100 Dutilh Road, Cranberry Township PA 16066 — 28,000 sq ft non-combustible warehouse, built 2005, NO SPRINKLER, concrete roof, TIV $7,280,000.
